location: Guaranteed drop from the Ancient Hero of Zamor, the boss at the end of the Giant-Conquering Hero's Grave dungeon in the Mountaintops of the Giants, reached via a lift down from the Giants' Gravepost grace.

source.name: Ancient Hero of Zamor (Giant-Conquering Hero's Grave)

tactics: From the Giants' Gravepost grace, head west to a large tomb and take the lift down into the Giant-Conquering Hero's Grave
A locked door partway through the dungeon requires a Stonesword Key to proceed
The Ancient Hero of Zamor is the dungeon's final boss — a frost-infused knight with sweeping curved-sword spins; circle to its flank to avoid the full arc of each swing

Don't confuse this dungeon-ending boss with the separate open-field 'Ancient Hero of Zamor' skirmish encounters found elsewhere in the Mountaintops/Weeping Peninsula — only this specific fight guarantees the sword
lore: Carried by the knights of Zamor, who earned great renown fighting in the war against the giants. Styled after a bitter winter wind, the blade carries a frost effect potent enough to freeze anything it cuts.

builds.name: DEX frost skirmisher
builds.why: D/D scaling that slightly favors Dexterity, plus a fixed 65 frostbite buildup, lets it chip away at enemy stamina/defense with every proc
